description: AUTH_MODULE module requires exclusive access (mutex lock)
DATABASE_MODULE module requires exclusive access (mutex lock)
API_MODULE module requires exclusive access (mutex lock)
DEVELOPER_A acquires AUTH_MODULE and DATABASE_MODULE one at a time (sequential acquisition) to commit
DEVELOPER_B acquires DATABASE_MODULE and API_MODULE one at a time (sequential acquisition) to commit
DEVELOPER_C acquires API_MODULE and AUTH_MODULE one at a time (sequential acquisition) to commit
Each developer must design locally before attempting to acquire module locks for commit
Circular wait: DEVELOPER_A holds AUTH_MODULE waiting for DATABASE_MODULE, DEVELOPER_B holds DATABASE_MODULE waiting for API_MODULE, DEVELOPER_C holds API_MODULE waiting for AUTH_MODULE
